name: EventHandler - Deathrattle
description: Verify Deathrattle EventHandler loads and can be read. Deathrattles trigger skills when entity dies.

steps.name: Find perk/skill with Deathrattle EventHandler
steps.code: var skills = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("SkillTemplate"); var skillFound = null; foreach(var skill in skills) { var handlers = (System.Collections.IList)Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty("SkillTemplate", skill.name, "EventHandlers"); if(handlers != null) { for(int i = 0; i < handlers.Count; i++) { var hType = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty("SkillTemplate", skill.name + "|EventHandlers[" + i + "]", "_type"); if(hType != null && hType.ToString().Contains("Deathrattle")) { skillFound = skill.name; break; } } } if(skillFound != null) break; } skillFound != null && !skillFound.IsEmpty

steps.name: Load EventHandlers array from found skill
